title: Q1 2025 Report Submission Deadline
message: All faculty members are reminded to submit their Q1 2025 Accomplishment Reports and Extension Outputs on or before April 15, 2025. Late submissions will be noted.
author: Dean's Office

title: IPCR Rating Period Now Open
message: Faculty IPCR entries for the 1st Semester 2025 are now open for submission. Program Chairs are requested to complete scoring by April 30, 2025.
author: Dr. Maria Santos

title: Research Colloquium – April 25
message: Research Coordinators and Faculty with ongoing research projects are required to present updates at the Research Colloquium on April 25. Register via the Research Office.
author: Dr. Ana Reyes

title: System Maintenance Notice
message: ConneCCS will undergo scheduled maintenance on April 8, 2025 from 10PM–2AM. Please ensure all pending submissions are completed before this window.
author: IT Administrator
